buildCommand: cd ../.. && corepack enable && corepack prepare pnpm@9.15.9 --activate && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm --filter @guild/shared-types build && pnpm --filter @guild/shared-utils build && pnpm --filter @guild/web build
installCommand: cd ../.. && corepack enable && corepack prepare pnpm@9.15.9 --activate && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
